Sandbox_DAMN_AllowVanillaWorldItemDisman: Enable house windows and mirrors recycling
Sandbox_ForeverInteriors_CleanZombiesIns: If enabled, zombies inside the room will be cleaned when entering.
Sandbox_ForeverInteriors_LightSwitchDel_: If enabled, light switches in interiors will be removed.
Sandbox_Tikitown_TikitorchSpawnRate: Spawn rate of the Tikitorch item
Sandbox_Tikitown_BaseballCollection_tool: Will enable or disable the entire baseball ball card collection drop chance from zombies and items
Sandbox_Tikitown_BaseballCollectionCommo: Adjust drop chance of common baseball card items, including the empty baseball card box in containers
Sandbox_Tikitown_BaseballCollectionRare_: Adjust drop chance of rare baseball card items in containers
Sandbox_Tikitown_BaseballCollectionZombi: Adjust drop chance of common baseball card items, including the empty baseball card box on zombies
Adjust drop chance of rare baseball card items on zombies
Sandbox_Tikitown_Tikitorch_tooltip: Enable or Disable the spawn of the Tikitorch spear weapon
Sandbox_Tikitown_TikitorchSpawnRate_tool: Adjust spawn rate of the Tikitorch weapon
Sandbox_Tikitown_HistoricalOutfits_toolt: Enable or Disable Tikitown's custom historically clad zombies
Sandbox_Tikitown_PostOfficeOverride_tool: Enable or Disable Tikitown's post office package system
Sandbox_Tikitown_MedicalStims_tooltip: Enable or Disable Tikitown's medical stims spawn
Sandbox_Tikitown_LaserTagItems_tooltip: Enable or Disable Tikitown's laser tag items spawn
Sandbox_Tikitown_PlushItems_tooltip: Enable or Disable Tikitown's Plush Collection World Spawn chances
Sandbox_DAMN_AllowPowerChadSpawns: Enable preset '49 Dodge Power Wagon spawns
Sandbox_DAMN_AllowPro440Spawns: Enable preset '69 Dodge Charger 440 Pro Touring spawns
Sandbox_DAMN_AllowWreckyMcChevySpawns: Enable preset '76 Chevrolet C30 Wrecker Al's Auto spawns
Sandbox_StreetSweeper: KI5 | '93 Ford CF-8000 Elgin Street Sweeper
Sandbox_StreetSweeper_SpriteWhitelist: Whitelist for sprites to be removed (a;b;c)
Sandbox_StreetSweeper_SpriteWhitelist_to: You can list exact sprite names or the start of tilepacks. Separate them with ;
Sandbox_StreetSweeper_AllowUserAutoDelet: Allow regular users to auto delete
WARNING: items and corpses will be gone forever. This has enormous griefing potential so it is disabled by default.
Sandbox_TigerDestoryBuilding_Tooltip:
When enabled, tanks will destroy buildings in the world
This option also affects artillery support
Sandbox_TigerDestorySafeHouse: Tank/Heli and Artillery Destroy Safe Houses
Sandbox_TigerDestorySafeHouse_Tooltip:
When enabled, tanks will destroy safe houses in the world; if building destruction is turned off, this option becomes ineffective
This option also affects artillery support
Sandbox_TigerDestoryNormalCar_Tooltip:
When enabled, tanks will destroy vehicles in the world
This option also affects artillery support
Sandbox_TigerDestoryBurnedCarOnly: Tank/Heli and Artillery Only Destroy Burned and Wrecked Vehicles
Sandbox_TigerDestoryBurnedCarOnly_Toolti:
When enabled, tanks will only destroy burned vehicles; requires the above option to be turned off
This option also affects artillery support
Sandbox_DestoryStartAsh_Tooltip:
When enabled, buildings and vehicles destroyed by tanks and artillery will produce ash
This option also affects artillery support
Sandbox_SpawnTigerInWorld_Tooltip: When enabled, tanks will spawn in the world
Sandbox_TigerNeedShovel: Tank/Heli Require a Dozer Blade to Push Through Zombies and Trees
Sandbox_TigerNeedShovel_Tooltip: When enabled, tanks require a dozer blade to push through zombies and trees
Sandbox_SpawnAmmoIntheWorld_tooltip: When enabled, ammunition will spawn in the world
Sandbox_SpawnAmmoIntheWorld_Percent: Percentage of Ammo Spawned in the World
Sandbox_SpawnAmmoIntheWorld_Percent_tool: Multiplier for the chance of ammo spawning in the world
Sandbox_UnlockAllRearch_tooltip:
When enabled, all research is unlocked upon entering the research interface
Not recommended
Sandbox_DisableAmmoBuy_tooltip: When enabled, ammo cannot be purchased
Sandbox_HeliGasMultiples_tooltip: helicopter gas will be multiplied by the number , the bigger the number, the faster the fuel will be consumed
Sandbox_RepairWhenSpawn_tooltip: When enabled, tanks/helicopters will be repaired when spawned
Sandbox_SpawnBurned_tooltip: When enabled, vehicles will spawn with a burned state(if the spawn point don't have chance to spawn a vehicle)
Sandbox_FloorHit_tooltip: When enabled, helicopters will reduce part condtions when they hit the wall
Sandbox_UH1BHueySpawnCount: Minimum amount of UH-1B Helicopters that will spawn in world
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Minimum_Streng: a character must have at least this level of strength to cut a lock
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Base_Duration_: how many seconds it will take, before strength is factored in
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Base_Muscle_St: how much muscle strain will be applied, before strength is factored in
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Allow_Shutters: whether the lock on security shutters over doors and windows can be cut open, the shutters will be destroyed
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Allow_Garage_D: allow cutting locks on garage doors
whether the lock on garage doors can be cut open
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Allow_Fence_Ga: allow cutting locks on fence gates
whether the lock on fence gates can be cut open
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Allow_Fences_t: whether bolt cutters can be used to destroy fence sections
Sandbox_DGMC_Bolt_Cutters_Fence_Wire_Cha: the percentage chance to drop wire when destroying a wire fence, 0 to disable
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_MaxLogs_tooltip: The maximum number of recent network logs to keep in history.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_PriceBuyMult_tool: Adjusts how expensive items are when buying from traders. Higher = More expensive.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_PriceSellMult_too: Adjusts how much traders pay you for items. Lower = Less profit.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_StockMult_tooltip: Adjusts the amount of items traders have in stock.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_WalkieDropChance_: The percentage chance (0-100) that a zombie will spawn with a Makeshift Walkie Talkie on death.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_GlobalWealthStart: The total amount of money available in the global economy at the start of the game.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_GlobalWealthStimu: The amount of money added to the Global Wealth pool every 3 days. This helps sustain the economy and prevent it from completely stalling.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_EventFrequency_to: How often the system checks to start a new Global Economic Event.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_EventChance_toolt: Probability of an event starting when the frequency check occurs.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_EventDuration_too: How long global events (e.g. Market Crash, Harvest) last.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_AllowSeasonalEven: If enabled, events like Harvest (Autumn) and Deep Freeze (Winter) can occur.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_AllowMetaEvents_t: If enabled, long-term world condition events can activate based on their conditions.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_AllowHardcoreEven: If enabled, negative events like Famine, War, and Inflation can occur.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_MaxEvents_tooltip: Maximum number of active events allowed (Stacking). Includes both Seasonal and Random events.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_FactionFlashMinAc: Minimum number of faction flash-event slots reserved per faction. Full multi-event logic is applied in the event-system runtime.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_FactionFlashMaxAc: Maximum number of concurrent faction flash-event slots per faction.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_NPCTradePopPercen: The maximum percentage of a faction's population allowed to be on a trading mission (Away or Trading status) at once.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_NPCTradingWalkHou: How many hours of travel time (Away state) the NPC takes to reach or return from a trading location.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_NPCTradingStayHou: How many hours the NPC stays at the trading location (Trading state).
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_InflationDecay_to:
Percentage of price inflation that recovers every day.
0.1 = 10% Decay.
0.5 = 50% Decay (Fast Recovery).
0.0 = Inflation never decays.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_RarityBonus_toolt: Increases or decreases the likelihood of rare items appearing. Positive values make rare loot more common.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_RestockInterval_t: How many days must pass before a trader refreshes their inventory.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_ScanBaseChance_to: The base probability of finding a signal when scanning with a standard Walkie Talkie.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_ScanCooldown_tool: Real-time minutes a player must wait between scanning attempts.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_HamRadioBonus_too: Multiplier applied to scan chance when using a stationary HAM Radio (vs Handheld).
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_DailyTraderMin_to: Minimum number of traders available to be found by the entire server per day.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_DailyTraderMax_to: Maximum number of traders available to be found by the entire server per day.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_ScanPenaltyPerTra: Reduces scan chance based on how many traders have already been found today. Higher = Harder to find the last few traders.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_SeasonImpact_tool: How strongly seasons affect prices (e.g. Winter making food expensive).
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_CategoryInflation: How fast prices rise when players buy out a specific category (Supply & Demand).
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_TraderStayHoursMi: Minimum in-game hours a trader stays connected before leaving.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_TraderStayHoursMa: Maximum in-game hours a trader stays connected before leaving.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_PublicNetwork_too:
ENABLED: All traders are shared. Everyone sees all discovered traders instantly (Classic Mode).\
DISABLED: Players must individually discover traders via radio scanning. Better radios = more discoveries before traders leave.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_WalletMinCashPerc: The minimum percentage of (Global Wealth / Trader Capacity) that a trader receives as their budget.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_WalletMaxCashPerc: The maximum percentage of (Global Wealth / Trader Capacity) that a trader receives as their budget.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_WalletEmptyChance: Percentage chance a wallet contains nothing but junk.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_WalletJackpotChan: Chance to hit the 'Tax Return' tier, granting max cash + bonus.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_SellDeflationChan: The chance (1 in X) that selling an item causes its global market value to decrease.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_SellPriceReductio: The probability that selling an item to a specific trader makes them pay less for subsequent copies of that item.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_TraderBudgetMin_t: The minimum starting cash for a newly discovered trader.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_TraderBudgetMax_t: The maximum starting cash for a newly discovered trader.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_AutoCloseDoor_t: If enabled, doors opened by the mod will automatically close after the player passes through them.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_WhileRunning_to: Allow breaching doors while in standard running mode.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_WhileSprinting_: Allow breaching doors while in full sprint (Alt key).
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_ShoveNearbyZomb: When bursting through a door, zombies on the other side will be shoved or knocked down.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_ShoveRange_tool: Distance behind the door to check for zombies to shove.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_ShoveAngle_tool: The cone angle for detecting zombies.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_KnockdownChance: Chance (0-100) that a shoved zombie will fall to the ground.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_EnablePropagati: If enabled, the force propagates to zombies standing behind the first line of targets.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_PropagationDept: How many rows of zombies deep the force can travel.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_PropagationStre: Chance for the force to transfer to the next zombie in the chain.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_EnableAnimation: If enabled, plays a shoulder-bash animation when breaching doors.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_BreachCost_tool: Base endurance lost per door breach (0.0 - 1.0). Example: 0.01 is similar to an axe swing.
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_FitnessReducesC: If enabled, higher Fitness skill reduces the endurance cost (approx 5% reduction per level).
Sandbox_EreFBIOpenUpDoor_FitnessXPGain_t: Experience points gained in Fitness skill for each door breached (0.0 to disable). For reference: A squat gives ~4 XP.
Sandbox_InjuredZombiesStumble_BaseChance: Default value: 40. Base chance for an injured zombie to stumble each check. This value is further modified by health, durability, and movement speed. Recommended values: Uncommon: 40 Rare: 20 Very Rare: 10
Sandbox_InjuredZombiesStumble_MinHealthP: Default value: 70. Zombies will only be able to stumble when their remaining health percentage is at or below this value. Higher values make zombies become unstable earlier. Recommended values: Early injuries: 80% Moderate injuries: 60% Severe injuries only: 40%
Sandbox_InjuredZombiesStumble_MinCooldow: Default value: 25. Minimum time before the same zombie can attempt to stumble again. Each zombie has its own independent cooldown. Recommended values: Frequent checks: 25 Balanced: 45 Very rare: 90
Sandbox_InjuredZombiesStumble_MaxCooldow: Default value: 60. Maximum time before the same zombie can attempt to stumble again. The actual cooldown is randomized between the minimum and maximum values. Recommended values: Frequent checks: 60 Balanced: 120 Very rare: 240
Sandbox_NepWRFuelUsed_tooltip: Vanilla default is 10, which is an entire welding torch.
Sandbox_NepWRNeedMask_tooltip: If disabled you can use Safety Squints instead of a welding mask
Sandbox_NepWRDebugMode: Prints additional debugging data to console
Sandbox_NepWRLootMult: Mutliplies the amount of items created by salvaging
Sandbox_ReadingPlus_SittingSpeedMultipli: Reading speed multiplier while sitting. Lower values = faster reading. Default: 0.8 (20% faster)
Sandbox_ReadingPlus_EnableWhileWalking_t: Allow characters to read books while walking. Default: enabled
Sandbox_ReadingPlus_EnableConfirmationDi: Your character will confirm they're going back to reading after sitting. Default: enabled
Sandbox_ReadingPlus_FilterAlreadyReadBoo: Literature that has already been read will be ignore by the reading queue. Default: enabled
Sandbox_ReadingPlus_FilterAboveLevelBook: Literature that is above the character's current skill level will be ignore by the reading queue. Default: enabled
Sandbox_SimpleLockpicking_CanFailLockpic: Determines whether it is possible for the player to fail a lockpick attempt or not.
Sandbox_SimpleLockpicking_FailChance_too: Chance for the player to fail a lockpick attempt. Not applicable if Can Fail Lockpick is not enabled.
Sandbox_SimpleLockpicking_LosePaperclipO: Determines whether the player breaks a paperclip on a failed lockpick attempt.
Sandbox_SimpleLockpicking_ActionSpeedMul: Higher values will decrease the time it takes for the player to pick a lock.
Sandbox_SimpleLockpicking_RequireBurglar: Determines whether the player must be a burglar to pick locks.
Sandbox_SimpleLockpicking_BurglarBonus_t: Additional chance for the player to succeed a lockpick attempt if they are a burglar.
Sandbox_ThumpingAttractsZombies_BaseRang: The base sound range generated by a single zombie while thumping an object.
Sandbox_ThumpingAttractsZombies_ScalePer: Controls how much the sound range increases for each additional zombie hitting the same object.
Sandbox_ThumpingAttractsZombies_Exponent: Controls how aggressively the sound range scales with the number of zombies. Lower values result in smoother scaling, higher values increase the range faster.
Sandbox_ThumpingAttractsZombies_MaxRange: The maximum sound range that can be generated, regardless of how many zombies are thumping the same object.
Sandbox_VacModUtils_EnableDebug: Enable Vac Mod series Debug Options
Sandbox_VacModUtils_EnableDebug_tooltip: Don't enable this toggle in normal gaming
Sandbox_VacMod6_WeightReduceRate_tooltip: The ratio to the total weight of the packed items

Sandbox_H_E_C_U_SeparatorBox_tooltip: Box used only as a section separator. <LINE><LINE>(Marker without function).
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ClothingCategoryDivider_: Box used only as a section category separator. <LINE><LINE>(Marker without function).
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ClothingSelection_toolti: The option to allow H.E.C.U. items to spawn in the world. <LINE><LINE>(will disable the other options in this category.)
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ClothingSpawnMult_toolti: Multiplier to increase or decrease the spawn of the clothing. <LINE><LINE>(The value will define the weight that will appear compared to other items.)
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ClothingMoreSpawns_toolt: A list of predefined zones that will spawn in the world. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Wardrobes-:  <RGB:1,1,1> WardrobeGeneric;WardrobeRedneck;ClosetShelfGeneric <LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Gun Store-:  <RGB:1,1,1> GunStoreShelf;CampingStoreClothes <LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Police-:  <RGB:1,1,1> PoliceOutfit;PoliceLockers;PoliceStorageOutfit;PoliceTruckBed <LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Truck Beds-:  <RGB:1,1,1> ArmyLightTruckBed;ArmyHeavyTruckBed;AdventurerTruckBed <LINE>
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ClothingMoreSpawns_optio: Gun Stores, Police, Truck Beds, Wardrobes
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ClothingMoreSpawnsCustom: Manually define Distribution lists. Separate names with
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedsCategoryDivider_tool: Box used only as a section category separator. <LINE><LINE>(Marker without function).
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedsCustomSpawn_tooltip: The option to allow all H.E.C.U. Zeds to spawn in the world. <LINE><LINE>(will disable the other options in this category.)
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedSpawnMult_tooltip: Multiplier to increase or decrease the spawn of the Zeds. <LINE><LINE>(The value will define the weight that will appear compared to other Zeds spawn.)
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedsMoreSpawns_tooltip: A list of predefined zones that will spawn in the world. <LINE><LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Default-:  <RGB:1,1,1> Default;Survivalist <LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Police-:  <RGB:1,1,1> Prison;Police;PoliceState <LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Gas Station-:  <RGB:1,1,1> Fossoil;Gas2Go;ThunderGas <LINE> <RGB:0.8,1,0.8> -Hospital-:  <RGB:1,1,1> NursingHome;Doctor;Pharmacist <LINE>
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedAttachedItems_tooltip: The option for H.E.C.U. Zeds to spawn with items attached to their models, such as radios or knives. <LINE><LINE> Disabling this option will remove radio sound effects from zeds.
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedAttachedItemsRifleVan: The option for H.E.C.U. Zeds to spawn with firearms items vanilla. <LINE><LINE> Disable this option so vanilla weapon spawns are not taken into account; custom firearms will still spawn.
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedAddedItems_tooltip: The option for H.E.C.U. Zeds to add items to their inventory and bags as extras.
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_ZedAddedSounds_tooltip: The option for H.E.C.U. Zeds to have custom sounds applied to the Zeds themselves.
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_AttachmentsCategoryDivid: Box used only as a section category separator. <LINE><LINE>(Marker without function).
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_BackpackBackSlot_tooltip: Unchecking this box will remove the back attachment
Sandbox_H_E_C_U_BeltSlots_tooltip: Unchecking this box will remove the attachments

Sandbox_MoneyFromCreditCard_Mode_tooltip: Random: you will get a random amount based on MIN and MAX values; Fixed: you will always get the value set in MIN.
Sandbox_MoneyFromCreditCard_Min_tooltip: The minimum amount you will get from a credit card.
Sandbox_MoneyFromCreditCard_Max_tooltip: The maximum amount you can get from a credit card.
Sandbox_MoneyFromCreditCard_CertificateM: Multiplier for cash received from certificates.
Multiply the amount received from a Stock certificate.
Sandbox_MoneyFromCreditCard_Bank_tooltip: Require the player to be near a place where you can withdraw money.
Sandbox_MoneyFromCreditCard_DestroyCC_to: Choose wheter to destroy the CC on use or keep it for multiple withdraws. If 'percentage' is choosen, set a value in 'Destroy Chances' field.
Sandbox_MoneyFromCreditCard_DestroyChanc: If percentage is choosen in the Destroy CC option, this value will be taken into account to calculate if the CC will be destroyed or not.
Sandbox_VacMod2_DisguiseDuration_tooltip: effective duration of using rotten meat to disguise yourself
Sandbox_VacMod2_EnablePacking_tooltip: Should directly classify and pack if install 'More Packing' mod
Sandbox_VacMod2_PunishRate: Effect Rate of Special Conditions on Stealth Time(%)
Sandbox_VacMod2_PunishRate_tooltip: Special Conditions contains 'Be exposed to the rain(-1.5min)','Running(-0.3min)' and 'Sprinting(-0.6min)'
Sandbox_VacMod2_SimpleMode_tooltip: Items in corpses will be deleted
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_Enabled_tooltip: Master switch for this mod’s lighting. Disable to turn off generator powered streetlights without removing the mod; useful for testing and avoiding Lua reloading.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightRadius: The tile range of how far a generator powers world light sources. Larger ranges light up more of the map, but values past 40 can make lights take longer to appear. 20–35 is average and recommended for performance. Note: The vanilla Sandbox generator tile range does NOT affect this value.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_IncludeDecorative: Lights sprites that define their own light (signs, shop fronts, billboards) within a powered area.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_DecorativeLightBo: Scales the radius of decorative/sign lights created by the mod (not brightness). Higher values make those lights reach farther, but can also cause performance penalties.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_UseCustomStreetli: When enabled, forces streetlights to use the custom RGB color set below (or use the color order below). Decorative/sign lights keep their own colors.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightColorP: Choose a predefined color for streetlights. To use custom RGB, enable 'Override streetlight color' above and set the RGB sliders.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightColorR: Red channel for custom streetlight color. Used when 'Override streetlight color' is enabled.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightColorG: Green channel for custom streetlight color. Used when 'Override streetlight color' is enabled.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightColorB: Blue channel for custom streetlight color. Used when 'Override streetlight color' is enabled.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightColorO: Advanced: for tilesets that store color in a non-RGB order. Keep at RGB unless you know what you're doing.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightLampRa: Radius of the glow for each streetlight lamp (not the generator radius). Higher values create more overlap and brightness at the cost of performance.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_StreetlightIntens: Overall brightness multiplier for streetlight lights. 100% = default. 120% is slightly brighter; 50% is dimmer.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_CullLightsToView_: When enabled, disables lights far outside the player’s current view to reduce GPU/CPU usage in dense areas. Use if you’re running into performance problems.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_ViewCullRadius_to: How far from each player lights are kept when culling is enabled. Increase to keep distant lights visible; reduce for more performance.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_ViewCullPadding_t: Advanced: extra margin beyond the cull radius to avoid pop-in while moving. A small buffer (8–16) is recommended.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_InstantWarmup: Instant warmup burst on area entry
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_InstantWarmup_too: Advanced: briefly boosts the relight process when you enter a powered area so lights appear to turn on instantly. Recommended to leave on.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_GenDiscoverRadius: Advanced: distance around each player to scan for generators that power streetlights. Larger values pick up more gens sooner at a small overhead.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_TogglePollRadius_: Advanced: within this range of a player, generators are checked frequently for ON/OFF changes. Larger radius detects changes farther away with more polling.
Sandbox_StreetlightGen_ExcludeSprites_to: Advanced: Comma-separated list of sprite names or prefixes to exclude from lighting on (e.g., advertising_01_36, billboard_). Leave blank to include all supported sprites.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_BroadcastDayM: Controls how broadcast.day is interpreted for AZAS stations.<LINE><LINE>Calendar day uses days since game start, where Day 1 begins at the first midnight.<LINE>Relative day makes day 0 start at the epoch below (or auto-set when the mod first runs on this save).
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_BroadcastDayE: Only used when Broadcast day mode is set to Relative.<LINE><LINE>0 = broadcast day 0 starts at world day 0.<LINE>N = broadcast day 0 starts at world day N.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_StationBandwi: Prevents overlapping audio from multiple world radios tuned to the same AZAS station.<LINE><LINE>If a radio is playing a station, any other world radio within this radius (in tiles) tuned to the same station will be muted on the client. 0 = disabled.<LINE><LINE>Approx: 24 tiles ~= 80 feet.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_DebugHandoff_: Prints detailed logs for priority->fallback (and other) broadcast handoffs, plus audio start retries for music pools. Use only while debugging; log spam.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_DebugSchedule: Prints detailed logs explaining why certain broadcasts are (or are not) considered candidates (day/time/once-per-player), plus what gets chosen. Use only while debugging; log spam.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_DebugMP_toolt: Prints MP-focused logs: world device state sync events (power/channel), forced stops, and ownership gating. Use only while debugging; log spam.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_DebugPool_too: Prints detailed logs for pool snapshot, pool track set/sync, and pool selection decisions. Use only while debugging; log spam.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_DebugStackDet: Tracks and warns if the local client starts multiple overlapping sound instances for the same radio device (a stacking symptom). Use while reproducing MP issues; log spam.
Sandbox_AZASFrequencyIndex_StackGuard_to: If the client detects multiple overlapping sounds being started for the same radio device, it immediately stops the newest one. Intended to prevent runaway stacking while debugging MP.

Sandbox_AutomaticRefueling_CanPumpBeRepa: Whether a damaged pump can be repaired. Only relevant if

If enabled, water sources will show the Drink menu even when thirst is below 10% (inventory/containers/ground panel).
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_WalletMinCash_too: The minimum amount of money found in a wallet (if not empty).
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_WalletMaxCash_too: The maximum amount of money found in a normal wallet. Jackpots can exceed this.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_FactionStartPop_t: Initial number of members in a generated faction.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_FactionDailyConsu: Multiplier for daily food/meds consumption. Higher = Harder for factions to survive.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_FactionGrowthChan: Daily chance for a stable faction to recruit a new member (if recruits are available).
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_GlobalRecruitCoun: Total number of new wanderers available for all factions to recruit each day.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_FactionDeathThres: How many days a faction can go without food before members start dying rapidly.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_MaxFactionsPerTow: The maximum number of distinct factions that can exist in a single town at once.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_FactionRespawnCha: Daily chance for a new faction to arrive in a town if the number of existing factions is below the limit.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_IndependentSpawnR: The minimum tile distance from an active player that an Independent (Nomadic) or wandering trader can spawn.
The maximum tile distance from an active player that an Independent (Nomadic) or wandering trader can spawn.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_TownTraderWanderC: The percentage chance that a town-based trader will decide to wander out of their home town and spawn near an active player instead.
Sandbox_LaserAndGunLightUseBattery: Laser and Gun Light Use Batteries
Sandbox_LaserAndGunLightUseBattery_toolt: Use green batteries to power lasers and gun lights.
Sandbox_GGSGS_LootAmount_tooltip: Scales how often Guns Project items appear (0 removes them, Everywhere! is very common).
Sandbox_GGSGS_weaponpart_wear_by_shot_to: If enabled, attached weapon parts lose condition on every shot and can break.
Sandbox_GGSGS_AttachmentsLowerChance_too: Chance for non-silencer attachments to lose 1 condition per shot. Lower values wear faster.
Sandbox_GGSGS_SilencersLowerChance_toolt: Chance for silencers to lose 1 condition per shot. Lower values wear faster.
Sandbox_GGSGS_weapon_random_condition_to: If enabled, newly generated firearms spawn with a random condition value.
Sandbox_GGSGS_weaponpart_loot_max_condit: Loot weapon parts spawn at max condition
If enabled, loose weapon parts and weapon-attached parts spawn fully repaired.
Sandbox_GGSGS_weaponpart_random_conditio: Weapon parts spawn with random condition
If enabled and max-condition is disabled, loose parts and attached parts spawn with random condition.
Sandbox_GGSGS_ManualRack_tooltip: If enabled, automatic racking is disabled. You must rack manually after each shot/reload cycle, and dry racking is allowed.

Sandbox_SPNCharCustom_AllowCustomisation: Admins or players holding an Appearance Changer ignore this

Sandbox_SPNCharCustom_BodyHairGrowthEnab: Body hair and stubble grows in-game
Sandbox_SPNCharCustom_MuscleVisuals_tool: Display visible muscles on character depending on strength level
Sandbox_SPNCharCustom_MissingEyeVisionMo: Players with missing eye customisation will have a vision penalty - Set to 1.0 to disable
Sandbox_SPNCharCustom_WashMakeup_tooltip: In vanilla washing yourself will also wash off makeup
Sandbox_TikitownPower_DailyDegradeChance: Chance to apply wear to parts (-1 is never) MUST RESTART
Sandbox_TikitownPower_RunningWearMultipl: Multiplier for base wear rate MUST RESTART
Sandbox_TikitownPower_PartsCanBeDestroye: Worn out parts can be destroyed MUST RESTART
Sandbox_TikitownPower_DailyDegradeChance: Percent chance (number * 10%) for parts to wear down
Sandbox_TikitownPower_RunningWearMultipl: How much of the item's base wear rate is applied on a daily basis
Sandbox_TikitownPower_PartsCanBeDestroye: Flag for if a worn out part can self-destruct and need to be replaced
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_AntiqueCollect: Requires scavenging skill mod, otherwise always static
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_FastWorkerSkil: Carpentry + Cooking + Farming + First Aid + electrical + Metalworking + Mechanics + Tailoring
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_Graverobber_to: Requires scavenging skill mod, otherwise always static
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_IdealWeightTar: Ideal Weight Days Required to Obtain
How many days you have to keep your weight between 78 and 82 to earn the trait. Check is made every in-game hour.
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_IdealWeightObt: How many hours you can be not between 78-82 weight while earning the trait and not reset your progress. Check is made every in-game hour.
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_IdealWeightLos: Ideal Weight Lose Grace Period Cap
How many hours can you 'earn' on counter that later will be used before you lose your Ideal Weight trait if your weight is not between 75-85
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_IdealWeightDyn: Ideal Weight Lose Grace Period Hours Speed Multiplier

How fast you earn 'grace period' hours that later are used up before you lose the trait if you're not between 75-85 weight. Default multiplier of 1 earns you 1 grace period hour for every 12h of keeping weight 78-82 (Basically 0.0834 grace hours for each 1h). Higher multiplier = faster gain of grace hours. Lower multiplier = slower gain of grace hours.
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_Immunocompromi: How many hours does wounds on your body need to be infected for to loose Immunocompromised. Each body part is counted separately so if you have 3 infected wounds, you'd earn +3 to the counter in 1h.
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_Incomprehensiv: Requires scavenging skill mod, otherwise always static
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_IndefatigableS: Strength + Fitness + Sprinting + Lightfoot + Nimble + Sneak + Axe + Blunt + SmallBlunt + LongBlade + SmallBlade + Spear
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_LeadFootKill_t: Finish zombies by stomping them. Only last hit needs to be stomp
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_MotionSickenss: Requires driving skill mod, otherwise always static
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_MundaneDamage_: Amount of damage you need to deal to lose the trait. Zombies have between 0-2 hp.
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_ParanoiaHoursL: How many hours you need to be panicked and stressed (at same time) above average to get rid of trait
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_Scrounger_tool: Requires scavenging skill mod, otherwise always static
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_SlowWorkerSkil: Carpentry + Cooking + Farming + First Aid + Electricity + MetalWelding + Mechanics + Tailoring
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_SuperImmuneInf: How many hours does wounds on your body need to be infected for to earn Super-Immune. Each body part is counted separately so if you have 3 infected wounds, you'd earn +3 to the counter in 1h.
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_TavernBrawlerS: Axe + Short Blunt + Long Blunt + Short Blade + Long Blade
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_UnwaveringCoun: This is internal counter that needs to be reached before you get the trait. Each injury below belt adds to counter every 10 min. Deep Wound > Laceration > Burn/Fracture > Scratch > Bleeding. For example, having burns on 1 bodypart below belt would result in getting around +2.3 on counter in 24h. Having 1 fracture gives around +3 in 24h.
Sandbox_MoreTraitsDynamic_Vagabond_toolt: Requires scavenging skill mod, otherwise always static
Sandbox_PurgeOnSpawn_tooltip: Enable this so you don't immediately die because you spawned next to a zombie hidden next to the trees
Sandbox_PurgeDistance_tooltip: This is how far the decimator will, well, decimate zombies, only runs once at spawn
Sandbox_VehicleSpawnToggle_tooltip: Disable this to not have starting vehicles & trailers spawn at all, essentially disabling the mod
Sandbox_TrailerSpawnToggle_tooltip: Disable this to not have starting trailers spawn at all
Sandbox_TrailerSpawnChance_tooltip: Change this to affect the Trailer's spawning chance
Sandbox_DAMN_AllowChonkerSpawns: Enable preset '87 Ford F700 SWAT spawns
Sandbox_DAMN_AllowCashcowSpawns: Enable preset '87 Ford F700 Armored Truck spawns
Sandbox_DAMN_AllowMcBoxySpawns: Enable preset '87 Ford F700 Box Truck spawns
Sandbox_zRePA_ChanceMillitary_tooltip:
The recommended number is no lower than the default value.
Zero value disable spawn.
Common zombies range from 2000+.
For example, the golfer zombie (quite rare) has 2000 weight and the park ranger 10000.
Sandbox_zRePA_ChanceMilEXO_tooltip:
The recommended number is no lower than the default value.
Zero value disable spawn.
Common zombies range from 2000+.
For example, the golfer zombie (quite rare) has 2000 weight and the park ranger 10000.

The recommended number is no lower than the default value.

Common zombies range from 2000+.
For example, the golfer zombie (quite rare) has 2000 weight and the park ranger 10000.
Sandbox_ArtequinClothes_EnableMod_Toolti: Fully enable or disable the mod's outfits and loot spawning.
Sandbox_ArtequinClothes_ZombieOutfitMult: Multiplies the chance of zombies spawning with the mod's outfits. <LINE> <RGB:1,0.5,0> WARNING: </RGB> High values (e.g., 5.0) will make many zombies look identical.
Sandbox_ArtequinClothes_ZombieLootMultip: Multiplies the loot found inside zombie inventories. <LINE> <RGB:1,1,0> NOTE: </RGB> It is recommended to keep this low (1.0 - 2.0) to keep garments rare and valuable.
Sandbox_ArtequinClothes_WorldLootMultipl: Multiplies the amount of mod items in containers (wardrobes, closets, stores). <LINE> <RGB:1,0,0> IMPORTANT: </RGB> Extremely high values may clutter shelves and overshadow the game's original loot.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_NPCWeaponDurabili: If enabled, only player-roster NPCs consume weapon durability in combat. World NPCs never use this mechanic.
Sandbox_DynamicTrading_NPCBaseHealthMult: Scales the archetype base HP used by DT NPC custom health. 1.0 = default values, 2.0 = double base HP before skill bonuses.
Sandbox_SCSLevelEnable_tooltip: WARNING: ADVANCED USERS ONLY. <LINE> <LINE> Invalid Level Setting WILL CAUSE A CRASH. <LINE> <LINE> See instructions before enabling this option.
Sandbox_SCSLevel_tooltip: Enable Level Changes (above) must be checked for this setting to take effect.  See instructions before enabling this option. <LINE>
Sandbox_SCSCellX_tooltip: Enter the first number in the Cell coordinates. <LINE> <LINE> Valid vanilla map Cell X range is from 10 to 49. <LINE>
Sandbox_SCSCellY_tooltip: Enter the second number in the Cell coordinates. <LINE> <LINE> Valid vanilla map Cell Y range is from 4 to 44. <LINE>

Sandbox_SCSRelY_tooltip: Enter the second number in the Rel coordinates. <LINE>
Sandbox_SCSPosX_tooltip: Enter the X value from the coordinates. <LINE>
